controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm/repair/abstain with v2.3 infrequent quantified-rate repair over unknown

hypothesis: Local Qwen3.6:35b verify-repair v2.3 repairs cap-25 infrequent over-unknown failures (gan_13123/gan_14485/gan_14881/gan_15306) while preserving v2.2 guardrails slice wins on unknown/no-reference, YTD, and cluster cases.
metric_caveats: Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
